arts.ttl: Bayern hat-trick hero Harry Kane the star of European Team of the Week
arts.sum: Harry Kane scored his third Bayern Munich hat-trick of the season over the weekend, and the England hitman is the European Player of the Week. Representatives from Brighton, Werder Bremen, Brentford, ...

Barcelona add sixth injury to treatment table for Bayern Munich clash in Champions League - Football España The Champions League continues for FC Barcelona this week with a mouth-watering game at home to German giants Bayern Munich.

arts.ttl: When Bayern Munich and Borussia Dortmund thumped Barcelona and Real Madrid in 2013
arts.sum: This week’s Champions League has delivered Borussia Dortmund vs Real Madrid and Bayern Munich vs Barcelona on back-to-back nights, and if that sounds familiar, it’s for good reason. The new league phase has given us some interesting ties so far, but none quite on the level of Bayern against Barca, both six-time European champions who top their respective leagues as two of the form teams on the continent.

arts.ttl: Latest transfer news: Araujo set to leave Barcelona, Rashord heading to Bayern?
arts.sum: The transfer market remains closed until January but clubs are still extremely busy behind the scenes as they plan for future arrivals. And Transfermarkt will be going LIVE on YouTube every Monday...

arts.ttl: Football transfer rumours: Bayern join Rashford race; Zirkzee wants Man Utd exit
arts.sum: Joshua Zirkzee is'starting to regret' his decision to move to Old Trafford in the summer and has been tipped to return to Italy, where both Juventus and Milan could make loan approaches. Araujo is also being targeted by Man Utd and Chelsea, with his current contract set to expire in 2026.

arts.ttl: LaLiga aim to play Barcelona vs Atletico Madrid clash in Miami before Christmas - despite Fifa stance
arts.sum: The Premier League are no longer looking at overseas games as an option

arts.ttl: Contact made: Chelsea willing to hold talks with Barcelona over midfielder transfer
arts.sum: Chelsea midfielder Carney Chukwuemeka is reportedly attracting transfer interest from Barcelona, according to Blues journalist Simon Phillips. arts.ttl: Barcelona transfer news: Manchester United, Chelsea 'monitoring contract situation' of star man
arts.sum: Two Premier League sides are reportedly monitoring the contractual situation of a Barcelona defender ahead of 2025.
